testcase.name: protectedPath_validToken_allowedThrough
testcase.system-out:
01:58:32.887 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.microlearning.gateway.ApiGatewayTest]: ApiGatewayTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 01:58:33.149 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.microlearning.gateway.ApiGatewayApplication for test class com.microlearning.gateway.ApiGatewayTest

While this cache implementation is useful for development and tests, it's recommended to use Caffeine cache in production.You can switch to using Caffeine cache, by adding it and org.springframework.cache.caffeine.CaffeineCacheManager to the classpath. 2026-07-01T01:58:38.657+05:30 INFO 20380 --- [ main] o.s.b.web.embedded.netty.NettyWebServer : Netty started on port 50835 (http) 2026-07-01T01:58:38.753+05:30 INFO 20380 --- [ main] c.microlearning.gateway.ApiGatewayTest : Started ApiGatewayTest in 5.133 seconds (process running for 7.151) 2026-07-01T01:58:39.837+05:30 INFO 20380 --- [ parallel-1] c.m.gateway.filter.LoggingFilter : [gateway] → GET /api/users/1 correlationId=cbe6b9ad-7de4-47f2-975d-f7084f700a0f 2026-07-01T01:58:40.095+05:30 ERROR 20380 --- [ctor-http-nio-2] a.w.r.e.AbstractErrorWebExceptionHandler : [1fcd2c47] 500 Server Error for HTTP GET "/api/users/1"

been observed at the following site(s): *__checkpoint ⇢ org.springframework.cloud.gateway.filter.WeightCalculatorWebFilter [DefaultWebFilterChain] *__checkpoint ⇢ HTTP GET "/api/users/1" testcase.name: protectedPath_noToken_returns401
testcase.system-out: 2026-07-01T01:58:40.178+05:30 WARN 20380 --- [ parallel-2] c.m.g.filter.JwtAuthenticationFilter : [jwt-filter] Missing or malformed Authorization header for path=/api/users/1

testcase.name: correlationId_generatedWhenAbsent

testcase.name: protectedPath_expiredToken_returns401
testcase.system-out: 2026-07-01T01:58:40.231+05:30 WARN 20380 --- [ parallel-4] c.m.g.filter.JwtAuthenticationFilter : [jwt-filter] Expired JWT for path=/api/users/1

testcase.name: protectedPath_tamperedToken_returns401
testcase.system-out: 2026-07-01T01:58:40.302+05:30 WARN 20380 --- [ parallel-6] c.m.g.filter.JwtAuthenticationFilter : [jwt-filter] Invalid JWT for path=/api/users/1: JWT signature does not match locally computed signature. JWT validity cannot be asserted and should not be trusted.

testcase.name: correlationId_passedThroughWhenPresent
testcase.system-out:
2026-07-01T01:58:40.319+05:30 INFO 20380 --- [ parallel-7] c.m.gateway.filter.LoggingFilter : [gateway] → GET /api/users/1 correlationId=test-correlation-id-12345 2026-07-01T01:58:40.327+05:30 ERROR 20380 --- [ctor-http-nio-4] a.w.r.e.AbstractErrorWebExceptionHandler : [5755e791] 500 Server Error for HTTP GET "/api/users/1"
